entries.claim_text: Expert Personas Improve LLM Alignment but Damage Accuracy: Bootstrapping Intent-Based Persona Routing with PRISM
entries.quoted_snippet: Expert Personas Improve LLM Alignment but Damage Accuracy

entries.claim_text: Zizhao Hu, Mohammad Rostami, Jesse Thomason
entries.quoted_snippet: Zizhao Hu

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: In this work

entries.claim_text: Figure 1: expert persona 在模型、任務、粒度與位置上的影響
entries.quoted_snippet: Expert persona impact across models, tasks, granularity, and placement

entries.claim_text: Figure 2: instruction-tuned vs reasoning-distilled 的 per-persona 效果熱圖
entries.quoted_snippet: indicate gains are context-driven rather than expertise-specific

entries.claim_text: Figure 3: PRISM 五階段訓練管線與兩個替代方案的對比
entries.quoted_snippet: The five-stage PRISM training pipeline, which addresses both limitations

entries.claim_text: Figure 4: 各類別路由到 LoRA 的比例 vs expert persona 效果
entries.quoted_snippet: MMLU (low), safety (high), MT-Bench (mixed)

entries.claim_text: 這篇論文回答一個在實務上長期矛盾的問題
entries.quoted_snippet: persona effectiveness is fundamentally task-type dependent

entries.claim_text: 作者把 LLM 能力拆成兩層來源
entries.quoted_snippet: models learn alignment capabilities such as stylistic adaptation, tone control, format adherence

entries.claim_text: 在判別式知識任務上，證據很直接
entries.quoted_snippet: underperforms the base model consistently across all four subject categories

entries.claim_text: 反過來在對齊型任務上 persona 一致有幫助
entries.quoted_snippet: improve scores in 5 out of 8 categories

entries.claim_text: persona 的效果還與模型如何被優化強相關
entries.quoted_snippet: persona effectiveness is fundamentally tied to what was learned and preserved at each training stage

entries.claim_text: 能不能只吸收有益的部分、避開有害的部分
entries.quoted_snippet: PRISM builds its entire training pipeline using only the base model itself

entries.claim_text: PRISM 管線分五個階段自我閉環
entries.quoted_snippet: The expert persona wins only if it is selected in both orderings

entries.claim_text: gate 的設計有一個精巧之處
entries.quoted_snippet: the gate always receives the same representation regardless of whether the adapter is active

entries.claim_text: R_\phi(x) = \sigma(W_\phi \cdot h(x)) \in [0, 1]
entries.quoted_snippet: R_\phi(x) = \sigma(W_\phi \cdot h(x)) \in [0, 1]

entries.claim_text: 關鍵在於 LoRA 只套用在第
entries.quoted_snippet: with GELU activations, operating on the last-token hidden state of the first transformer layer

entries.claim_text: P_{\theta + \Delta\theta}(\cdot \mid x) & \text{if } R_\phi(x) \geq 0.5
entries.quoted_snippet: P_{\theta + \Delta\theta}(\cdot \mid x) & \text{if } R_\phi(x) \geq 0.5

entries.claim_text: 換言之，只有在 persona 行為確實有益的查詢上才啟動 LoRA
entries.quoted_snippet: compressing both beneficial and harmful persona behaviors into shared parameters

entries.claim_text: 把整條路徑用 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct 的實際數字走一遍
entries.quoted_snippet: 282 distill and 318 retain samples (600 total)
73.5 Overall

entries.claim_text: 具體讀這張表
entries.quoted_snippet: where expert prompting actively hurts

entries.claim_text: 最後一塊證據把「gate 學到了任務類型」這件事量化出來
entries.quoted_snippet: routes more aggressively to LoRA for categories where expert personas help

entries.claim_text: 文獻對其效益的分歧確實存在且未被系統性解釋
評審模型的選擇引入了循環風險
entries.quoted_snippet: the self-judge is rewarding the persona's verbose, step-by-step formatting rather than evaluating mathematical correctness

entries.claim_text: 數個「改善」落在單一標準差內
PRISM 的個別元件並不新
把 PRISM 當成通用的對齊提升方案來讀會高估其成熟度
